Class AbstractScmEnvironmentRepository

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.config.server.support.AbstractScmAccessor
org.springframework.cloud.config.server.environment.AbstractScmEnvironmentRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.beans.factory.Aware, EnvironmentRepository, SearchPathLocator, org.springframework.context.ResourceLoaderAware, org.springframework.core.Ordered
Direct Known Subclasses:
JGitEnvironmentRepository, SvnKitEnvironmentRepository
public abstract class AbstractScmEnvironmentRepository extends AbstractScmAccessor implements EnvironmentRepository, SearchPathLocator, org.springframework.core.Ordered
Author:
Dave Syer
